SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AiAnalysisException
Exception for AI analysis failures (auth, rate limit, network, parse).
AiAnalysisService
HTTP client for Anthropic, OpenAI, and Ollama AI provider APIs.
AiChatMessage
A single message in a multi-turn AI chat conversation.
AiConfig
Immutable configuration for AI analysis requests.
AiConfig.Builder
 
AiProvider
Supported AI providers for TLS scan analysis.
ApiValidator
Validates DV API scan results against openssl for the same host.
BackgroundTask
A background task to do the scanning.
CategoryDefinition
A scoring category parsed from YAML.
CertificateMessage
Parses TLS Certificate message and extracts certificate chain with embedded SCTs.
CipherSuiteUtilServerHello
Parses a TLS ServerHello handshake message from a raw input stream, extracting protocol version, cipher suite, compression method, server certificate details, and TLS 1.3 detection via the supported_versions extension.
ClientHello
Builder for TLS ClientHello messages.
ClientHelloConfig
Configuration for building a TLS ClientHello message.
ComparisonResult
Structured result of comparing DV API output against openssl for one host.
CryptoUtils
Encryption utilities for DeepViolet scan persistence.
DeepVioletException
Base exception class for DeepViolet API
DeepVioletFactory
Initial entry point for all DeepViolet API work.
DerParser
Lightweight ASN.1 DER parser to replace Bouncy Castle dependencies.
DerParser.DerValue
Represents a parsed DER value with its tag and content.
ECCurveNames
Static lookup table for EC curve names to replace Bouncy Castle's ECNamedCurveTable.
ExternalizedCategoryScorer
Generic expression-driven scorer that evaluates rules from a CategoryDefinition against a RuleContext.
FileUtils
 
HostSnapshot
Per-host data snapshot for scan persistence.
IAiAnalysisService
Service interface for AI-powered analysis of TLS scan reports.
ICipherSuite
DeepViolet representation of a cipher suite
IDnsStatus
DNS security status for a host.
IEngine
Interface specification for engine features available from an initialized host.
IHost
Representation of host (e.g., TLS/SSL server) to DeepViolet
ImmutableCategoryScore
Immutable implementation of IRiskScore.ICategoryScore for deserialized scan data.
ImmutableCipherSuite
Immutable implementation of ICipherSuite for deserialized scan data.
ImmutableDeduction
Immutable implementation of IRiskScore.IDeduction for deserialized scan data.
ImmutableRiskScore
Immutable implementation of IRiskScore for deserialized scan data.
IRevocationStatus
Revocation and transparency status for a certificate.
IRevocationStatus.RevocationResult
 
IRiskScore
Public interface for TLS risk score results.
IRiskScore.ICategoryScore
Per-category score details.
IRiskScore.IDeduction
Individual deduction within a category.
IRiskScore.IDeduction.IScope
Scope metadata for a deduction, describing the protocol layer, affected TLS versions, and specific mechanism being checked.
IRiskScore.IScoringDiagnostic
A diagnostic message produced during scoring.
IRiskScore.IScoringDiagnostic.Level
 
IRiskScore.LetterGrade
 
IRiskScore.RiskLevel
 
IRiskScore.ScoreCategory
 
IScanListener
Callback-based listener for scan events.
IScanMonitor
Pollable interface for monitoring scan progress.
IScanResult
Per-host result from a scan with section-level detail.
ISession
Created upon successful initialization of a target host.
ISession.CIPHER_NAME_CONVENTION
Enumeration of supported cipher suite naming conventions.
ISession.SESSION_PROPERTIES
Session properties.
IThreadStatus
Per-thread snapshot for UI display during scanning.
IX509Certificate
DeepViolet X.509 certificate representation.
IX509Certificate.TrustState
 
IX509Certificate.ValidState
 
OcspClient
OCSP client implementation using JDK classes, replacing Bouncy Castle.
OcspClient.OcspResponse
OCSP response details.
OcspClient.Status
Certificate status from OCSP check.
OpensslResult
Parsed results from running openssl s_client and x509 commands against a host.
PrintAiAnalysis
 
PrintAiChat
 
PrintBackgroundScan
Demonstrate the BackgroundTask subclass pattern used by both the DeepVioletTools GUI and CLI.
PrintCertificateChain
Walk the full server certificate chain and print detailed information for each certificate.
PrintCipherSuites
Enumerate server cipher suites grouped by handshake protocol.
PrintRevocationStatus
Print certificate revocation status using all available mechanisms: OCSP, CRL, OneCRL, OCSP Stapling, Must-Staple, and Certificate Transparency (SCTs from embedded, TLS extension, and OCSP stapling).
PrintRiskScore
 
PrintSaveScan
Demonstrates scanning one or more hosts and saving the results to a .dvscan file that can be opened later for analysis or transferred to another machine.
PrintScan
Demonstrate the scanning API.
PrintScanDelta
Demonstrates comparing two saved .dvscan files to show what changed between scans (scan delta).
PrintScanPersistence
Demonstrates the three scan persistence modes: Plain text — unencrypted JSON, portable everywhere Host locked — encrypted with machine key, zero-friction on same host Password locked — encrypted with machine key + password, portable across hosts
PrintSessionInfo
Print DeepViolet version info, host interfaces, connection characteristics, and HTTP response headers (with security header highlights).
PrintTlsFingerprint
Compute and analyze a TLS server fingerprint.
RiskScore
Implementation of IRiskScore.
RiskScore.CategoryScore
Implementation of IRiskScore.ICategoryScore.
RiskScore.Deduction
Implementation of IRiskScore.IDeduction.
RiskScore.Scope
Implementation of IRiskScore.IDeduction.IScope.
RiskScore.ScoringDiagnostic
Implementation of IRiskScore.IScoringDiagnostic.
RiskScorer
Orchestrator that runs all category scorers and produces the final risk score.
RuleContext
Builds a property namespace from TLS metadata and provides property resolution for the expression evaluator.
RuleDefinition
A single scoring rule parsed from YAML.
RuleExpression
AST nodes for the rule expression DSL.
RuleExpression.And
 
RuleExpression.Comparison
 
RuleExpression.Contains
 
RuleExpression.CountFiltered
count(list, filterField op filterValue) — filtered count over a list of maps.
RuleExpression.FunctionCall
 
RuleExpression.Literal
 
RuleExpression.Not
 
RuleExpression.Or
 
RuleExpression.PropertyRef
 
RuleExpressionEvaluator
Evaluates a RuleExpression AST against a RuleContext.
RuleExpressionParser
Recursive descent parser for the rule expression DSL.
RulePolicy
Complete loaded YAML rule policy: metadata, severity mapping, grade mapping, and category definitions with pre-parsed expressions.
RulePolicy.GradeMapping
A grade mapping entry from the YAML policy.
RulePolicy.SeverityMapping
A severity mapping entry from the YAML policy.
RulePolicyLoader
Parses a YAML rule policy file into a RulePolicy with pre-parsed expressions.
RuleScope
Structured scope metadata for a scoring rule, indicating which protocol layer, TLS versions, and specific mechanism the rule applies to.
ScanConfig
Configuration for TLS scanning.
ScanConfig.Builder
Builder for ScanConfig.
ScanFileIO
Public API for saving and loading encrypted .dvscan scan files and plain JSON scan snapshots.
ScanFileIO.PasswordCallback
Callback for password prompt during load.
ScanFileMode
Encryption mode for saving .dvscan scan files.
ScanSection
Defines the discrete phases of a host scan.
ScanSnapshot
Top-level persistence snapshot containing all scan results.
ServerHello
Full ServerHello message representation with ALL extensions captured.
ServerKeyExchange
Parsed ServerKeyExchange message for extracting key exchange parameters.
ServerKeyExchange.KexType
 
TargetSpec
Parses host specification strings into scan target URLs.
ThreadState
Represents the current state of a scanner thread.
TlsBehaviorProbes
TLS behavior probe definitions for server fingerprinting.
TlsException
TLS-specific exception for TlsSocket operations.
TlsExtension
Container for a TLS extension type and its data.
TlsMetadata
Aggregated metadata from a TLS handshake.
TlsRecordLayer
TLS record layer I/O for reading and writing TLS records.
TlsRecordLayer.HandshakeMessage
Container for a handshake message.
TlsScanner
TLS scanner with configurable threading, per-host rate limiting, per-host results, and a global monitor for UI integration.
TlsServerFingerprint
TLS Server Fingerprint computation.
TlsServerFingerprint.FingerprintComponents
Container for parsed TLS fingerprint components.
TlsSocket
Pure raw TLS socket implementation for TLS handshake analysis.
X509Extensions
X.509 extension parsing utilities to replace Bouncy Castle dependencies.
X509Extensions.SignedCertificateTimestamp
Represents a Signed Certificate Timestamp.
